zh.lifeSummary: 當Florence Darell Chichley於1384年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾約克時，她的父親Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London20歲，母親Beatrix Barrett16歲。她於1400年與Kt Sir John Burton在英國肯特普雷斯頓-可吉法維沙安結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年12月8日在英國肯特蕾托 哈特享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特蕾托 哈特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Florence Darell Chichley于1384年出生在英国英格兰越可爾約克时，她的父亲Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London20岁，母亲Beatrix Barrett16岁。她于1400年与Kt Sir John Burton在英国肯特普雷斯頓-可吉法維沙安结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1465年12月8日在英国肯特蕾托 哈特享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特蕾托 哈特。

nameMeanings.name: Florence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

variants.name: Florance
meanings: Medieval form of the Latin masculine name Florentius (a derivative of florens ‘blossoming, flourishing’) and its feminine form Florentia. In the Middle Ages the name was commonly borne by men (as, for example, the historian Florence of Worcester), but it is now exclusively a girl's name. This was revived in the second half of the 19th century, being given in honour of Florence Nightingale ( 1820–1910 ), the founder of modern nursing, who organized a group of nurses to serve in the Crimean War. She herself received the name because she was born in the Italian city of Florence (Latin Florentia, Italian Firenze).

nameMeanings.name: Darell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Darrell .

variants.name: Darrell
meanings: Mainly North American: transferred use of the surname, originally a Norman baronial name (d'Airelle) borne by a family who came from Airelle in Calvados. It was first used as a given name towards the end of the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Florence Darell Chichley was born in 1384, in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London, was 20 and her mother, Beatrix Barrett, was 16. She married Kt Sir John Burton in 1400, in Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 8 December 1465, in Little Chart, Kent, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Little Chart, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Florence Darell Chichley est née en 1384, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Barrett, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Kt Sir John Burton en 1400, à Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 décembre 1465, à Little Chart, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Chart, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Florence Darell Chichley 1384 in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London 20 und ihre Mutter Beatrix Barrett 16. Sie hat 1400 in Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, England Kt Sir John Burton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Dezember 1465 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Little Chart, Kent, England und wurde in Little Chart, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Florence Darell Chichley è nata il nel 1384 nel York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Beatrix Barrett, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Kt Sir John Burton nel 1400, nel Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 8 dicembre 1465, nel Little Chart, Kent, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Little Chart, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Florence Darell Chichleyが1384年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで生まれた時，父Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of Londonは20歳，母Beatrix Barrettは16歳であった。1400年にイギリスケントプレストン-ネクスト-ファバーシャムでKt Sir John Burtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1465年12月8日にイギリスケントリットル チャートで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントリットル チャートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Florence Darell Chichley(이)가 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Barrett(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 켄트 플레스토-니스트-파버샤에서 Kt Sir John Burton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 12월 8일 영국 켄트 리틀 처트에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리틀 처트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Florence Darell Chichley nasceu em 1384, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Barrett, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Kt Sir John Burton em 1400, em Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1465, em Little Chart, Kent, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Little Chart, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Florence Darell Chichley родилась в 1384 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Barrett, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Kt Sir John Burton в 1400 г. в местности престон-некст-фавиршам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 декабря 1465 г. в местности литл чарт, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности литл чарт, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Florence Darell Chichley nació en 1384, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Chicheley I, Sheriff of London, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Beatrix Barrett, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Kt Sir John Burton en 1400, en Preston-next-Faversham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1465, en Little Chart, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Little Chart, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
